pipeline_auto_attach_rate.description: Runs that automatically receive a pipeline without manual attachment.

meeting_auto_trigger_rate.description: Runs that should trigger meetings and do trigger them automatically.

agent_auto_assignment_rate.description: Tasks assigned to agents without manual task-by-task selection.

manual_override_rate.description: Runs that require manual pipeline, meeting, or agent override.

bounded_completion_rate.description: Runs completed within bounded job and retry limits.

replan_loop_rate.description: Runs that exceed the allowed replan pattern.

router_error_incidence.description: Runs that hit router transport failures.

event_coverage_rate.description: Runs with required event stages recorded.

decision_trace_completeness.description: Decisions that record reason, affected tasks, and outcome.

meeting_trace_completeness.description: Meeting runs with summary, assignments, and convergence reason.

artifact_pass_rate.description: Runs whose artifact verification fully passes.

false_success_block_rate.description: False-success candidates that are correctly blocked without flooding the system.

first_screen_answer_rate.description: Can a user answer status, active-agent, and trust questions from the default screen.

default_screen_primary_sections.description: Primary sections visible before expanding technical detail.

details_open_dependency.description: Fraction of runs where a user must open technical details to determine basic health.
